title: Subitem notifications for Slack - beyond status
excerpt:
Hello, 
I would like to send any updates made on subitems to a slack channel. 
At this time I can only trigger subitem slack updates based on status changes. 
Any ideas on how I could do this? 
Thank you, 
Nikolai

posts.author: npal (Nikolai)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: pbains95 (Priya Bains)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Nikolai,

Did you ever find a workaround for this? I’m having the same issue and unable to find a solution via the slack recipes or the custom automations.

Let me know!

Priya

posts.author: Bionicgeek (Roy Roberts)
posts.cookedHtml: Were either of y’all able to find a workaround for this?

posts.author: JayHayashi (Jay Lim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you tried using Dropdown? You can automated to notify Slack at certain preset condition in Dropdown list.
